prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic military reconnaissance photography, a highly trained sniper lying flat on his belly at the edge of a tall urban rooftop, maintaining a low-profile tactical position. The sniper wears modern black tactical combat gear, reinforced body armor, gloves, and sleek black protective spectacles with subtle reflections on the lenses. A precision sniper rifle equipped with a long-range scope and bipod is positioned directly in front of him, aligned toward a distant city skyline.
The rooftop features realistic concrete textures, weathered surfaces, scattered debris, ventilation units, and communication equipment. The sniper's posture is professional and disciplined, elbows firmly planted on the ground while carefully observing the surroundings through the rifle scope. Dramatic golden-hour sunlight casts long shadows across the rooftop, highlighting intricate details of the tactical equipment.
Background shows a vast metropolitan city with towering skyscrapers, atmospheric haze, and realistic depth compression. Cinematic composition, low-angle side perspective, intense military realism, ultra-detailed facial features partially visible beneath the spectacles, realistic fabric folds, photorealistic textures, shallow depth of field, natural color grading, HDR lighting, 8K resolution, professional war-photography aesthetic, masterpiece quality, razor-sharp focus, authentic special-forces atmosphere.
